decisions.current_gap_inventory_after_acceptance: resolved surfaces, no current missing surfaces

implementation_requirements: Add a provider-neutral static page entry that installs the shared shell without provider status requests.
Migrate About and Support from mock-site.ts to the provider-neutral static entry.
Add five owned HTML routes with canonical, metadata, analytics entry, shared shell, and no provider API requests.
Update the shared footer so Contact and legal routes are internal links and wrap safely.
Add route manifest ownership before deriving Public Readiness counts.
Change PR public browser route matrix to test the local candidate; retain Production Smoke for exact post-merge production verification.
Separate historical P8B missing-surface evidence from the current gap inventory before marking the five gaps resolved.
Update Vite inputs, sitemap, SEO QA, Content QA, route inventory, profile inventory, gap inventory, Production Smoke, browser acceptance, and documentation evidence together.
Privacy copy must describe existing GA4 and Local Watchlist browser-local storage truthfully.

Commercial Disclosure must not invent operator name, address, or phone; use the legally available request-disclosure mechanism only if the operator can actually provide the information without delay on request.
R12B external Stripe account state remains pending and must not be inferred from repository code.
